unit.name: wpdb live database schema helper Haxe candidate
unit.public_contract: WordPress-compatible maybe_create_table() and maybe_add_column() global PHP functions remain callable from wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php while selected schema-helper branch decisions delegate to typed Haxe and continue to execute against locked live MySQL and MariaDB runtimes through wpdb.

bridge.reason: WordPress core and plugins call global PHP upgrade helpers with native wpdb state. The candidate keeps the public PHP function shell and delegates only normalized table/column existence decisions to Haxe.
bounded_by: WPHX-305.08 live MySQL/MariaDB oracle comparison receipt
native wpdb query/get_var/get_col boundary for real database execution

removal_gate.condition: Promote from generated shell candidate to verified owned distribution only after broader wpdb/schema distribution work proves include timing, reflection, mixed PHP ABI, and plugin compatibility for upgrade.php.

smell_fixes.description: Separated maybe_create_table()/maybe_add_column() branch decisions from native SQL execution into typed Haxe helpers, making the decision surface explicit without changing observable WordPress behavior.

notes: The candidate provisions mysql-8.4 and mariadb-11.8 containers from locked index digests and runs the WPHX-305.07 live DB cases with local PHP mysqli. The broad wp-admin include remains stubbed because this workset is scoped to database helpers and storage paths.
